headline: JBL Q2 Deep Dive: AI Infrastructure and Segment Diversification Propel Results, Guidance Raised
summary: Electronics manufacturing services provider Jabil (NYSE:JBL) reported Q2 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $8.75 billion. On top of that, next quarter’s revenue guidance ($9.6 billion at the midpoint) was surprisingly good and 7.3% above what analysts were expecting. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.16 per share was 1.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
